dungeon: GENUINE ROTF target-server FACECAM stream (~10min, 9 dungeon entries) — the streamer's WEBCAM covers the bottom-left chat box, so taunts/loot chat are UNREADABLE. Relied on transitions/minimaps/f_-frames (per the facecam protocol). Multi-dungeon: an ABYSS-OF-DEMONS-style lava dungeon (player died here to 'Brute of the Abyss'), SPACE/VOID galactic zones, a large white structured hub/dungeon, green realm, tan dungeons, vault. LOW boss-content yield (no readable chat, no bossends) but the death screen + biomes/layout are documented.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-minimaps+transitions: (1) SPACE/VOID galactic zones — open dark maps (some with a dark GRID/tiled 'station' floor) with enemies scattered loosely across the void (no tight room walls); (2) an ABYSS cave — brown/tan BLOB-shaped cavern outline with lava chambers (the red-lava boss arena where the player died); (3) a large WHITE/GREY structured area with green edges + blue markers (vault/Nexus-style hub or an ice/white dungeon, room-partitioned); (4) tan/brown corridor dungeons + a green realm. Run hops hub <-> dungeons <-> space across 9 entries (1s..616s).

bosses.name: Brute of the Abyss
attacks: RECONSTRUCTED-from-name (facecam, no bossends, no clean trace): a 'Brute' = a melee/CHARGE/dive bruiser in the Abyss lava arena. NOT frame-traced -> reconstructed, flagged.
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-DEATH-SCREEN: the death summary reads 'died ... killed by Brute of the Abyss' (player = Level 20 Paladin, 8779 fame). The boss/enemy of the red-lava ABYSS dungeon. NO taunt (facecam covers chat). BASE-GAME-vs-ROTF-CUSTOM UNCERTAIN: the Abyss of Demons is base-game RotMG and 'Brute' enemies exist there, but 'Brute of the Abyss' as a named boss is not a confirmed base name -> flag, verify against base XML before treating as custom. Attack reconstructed from the 'Brute' archetype only.

minions: space/void enemies (scattered orange/yellow mobs in the galactic zones)

uncertain: CHAT UNREADABLE (facecam) -> zero taunts/loot recovered. confidence: MEDIUM-LOW. GENUINE ROTF (RotMG-engine, galactic zones, ROTF-style UI) but a FACECAM stream -> low recoverable boss content. Solid: the biome/dungeon set + layouts (Abyss cave, space/void, white hub) + the death-screen-confirmed enemy 'Brute of the Abyss'. Weak/honest gaps: NO taunts (facecam), NO traced attacks (no bossends), 'Brute of the Abyss' base-vs-custom unconfirmed. Recorded honestly rather than guessing. Best follow-up: a non-facecam clip of the Abyss boss + the galactic zone for taunts + attack geometry.
